since_last: 52% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.05%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +1.13% · Gold +0.62% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 52% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.05%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.05%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.65%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +16.31%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +16.31%, QCOM +12.15%, AMAT +6.56%, LRCX +6.45%, ARM +5.91%. Laggards: BABA -2.90%, CRM -1.35%, NOW -1.35%, CRNC -1.32%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.94% at $156.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.94% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
